message:
test(proptest): add 41 property-based tests for planner_features

Comprehensive proptest coverage for the mission planner pipeline:
- Composite scoring: bounded output, zero-weight invariant, default weight sum (3)
- Feature extraction: ready-only filtering, all-candidates inclusion, value bounds, ranked order (4)
- Multi-factor scorer: rank sequencing, descending sort, confidence threshold, output bounds,
  tag multipliers, count preservation, ranked_ids consistency (7)
- EffortBucket: monotonic ordering, score bounds, serde roundtrip (3)
- Assignment solver: max_assignments bound, no double-booking, safety gate enforcement,
  conflict pair enforcement, zero-capacity, offline agents (6)
- Anti-thrash governor: fresh-state allows all, cooldown blocking, starvation boost,
  thrash detection, history window bounding (5)
- Mission profiles: weight bounds, kind serde roundtrip, profile serde roundtrip (3)
- Utility policy tuner: same-profile noop, switch history, override clamping,
  clear-override restores, switch clears overrides (5)
- Serde roundtrip: feature vector, weights, scorer config, effort bucket (4)
- Determinism: scoring, solver (2)

All 41 pass, zero clippy warnings (subprocess-bridge feature).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
